title: mtDNA-haplotypes IN — ngsPedigree maternal-lineage validator input
description: TSV. Required columns: sample_id, mtdna_haplotype. Optional: mtdna_sequence (FASTA-style nucleotide string, equal length across cohort to enable Hamming distance), mtdna_n_sites. The mtDNA check is asymmetric — different haplotype is strong rejection of maternity, identical haplotype is compatible but not unique proof. Used by ngsPedigree as a pre-flight pedigree-validation layer before inversion polarization.
